filesCreated.purpose: Block metadata and attributes - copied exactly from spec
Editor component with RichText heading, FilteredServerSideRender, and sidebar controls
Frontend template - queries all public searchable post types, filters by post type, search, pagination with progress bar
Frontend JavaScript - AJAX filtering, search, pagination, URL state management, popstate handling
Block-specific styles - filter remove button X icon, card hover transitions
Block icon (24x24, integer coordinates, filled paths only)
Search magnifying glass icon for input field
Animated spinner for AJAX loading states
Search result card template - post type pill (accent colors), title, excerpt, Learn More button

warnings: Performance warnings for bundle size (expected, not blocking)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP structure match - heading uses RichText in TSX, h2 in PHP; FilteredServerSideRender targets .search-inner; all conditional classes synced

variations: Minimal - No Filters, No Per Page

implementationNotes.lightMode: Block uses page background (off-white), not dark mode like Archive. No charcoal overlay or dark pseudo-elements.
implementationNotes.searchBar: Search bar on its own row per spec. Search input full-width with icon on left, submit button on right.
implementationNotes.filterRow: Filter-by dropdown and per-page selector on separate row below search per spec.
implementationNotes.postTypeQuery: PHP dynamically queries all public searchable post types using get_post_types(['public' => true, 'exclude_from_search' => false]). Excludes 'attachment' and 'page'.
implementationNotes.filterDropdown: Multi-select pattern from Archive block - hidden input + select, values comma-separated.
implementationNotes.paginationProgressBar: Custom progress bar below pagination numbers with gradient fill (neon-green to blue). Width calculated as (current_page / total_pages) * 100%.
implementationNotes.noThemeHeading: Uses inline RichText for heading only, no ThemeHeading component (no eyebrow, description, or buttons in header area per Figma).
implementationNotes.cardTemplate: parts/card-search.php renders uniform cards: post type pill (bg-accent-lighter, border-accent-light), title (text-header-5), excerpt, Learn More button.
implementationNotes.singleColumn: Results display in single-column grid (grid-cols-1) with 32px gap (gap-8) per spec.
implementationNotes.ajaxPatterns: All filter changes, search submissions, pagination clicks, and load-more use AJAX. URL state managed via pushState/popstate. Results container uses aria-live='polite'.
